client_audio_pipeline_config_t(3) Library Functions Manual client_audio_pipeline_config_t(3)

NAME

client_audio_pipeline_config_t - Pipeline configuration parameters.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/audio/client_pipeline.h>

Data Fields


int sample_rate
uint64_t frame_size_ns
int opus_bitrate
uint64_t echo_filter_ns
int noise_suppress_db
int agc_level
int agc_max_gain
uint64_t jitter_margin_ns
float highpass_hz
float lowpass_hz
float comp_threshold_db
float comp_ratio
uint64_t comp_attack_ns
uint64_t comp_release_ns
float comp_makeup_db
float gate_threshold
uint64_t gate_attack_ns
uint64_t gate_release_ns
float gate_hysteresis
client_audio_pipeline_flags_t flags

Detailed Description

Pipeline configuration parameters.

All parameters have sensible defaults. Pass NULL to create() for defaults.

Definition at line 167 of file client_pipeline.h.

Field Documentation

int client_audio_pipeline_config_t::agc_level

AGC target level (default: 8000, range 1-32767)

Definition at line 181 of file client_pipeline.h.

AGC maximum gain in dB (default: 30)
